option.name: originalContent

updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Test Organization
This directory contains all unit tests for the ConstExpr source generator, organized by category.
## Directory Structure
### Math/ (11 tests) Mathematical operations and transformations: - `AbsoluteValueTest.cs` - Absolute value calculation - `BitwiseOperationsTest.cs` - Bitwise operations (AND, OR, XOR) - `CelsiusToFahrenheitTest.cs` - Temperature conversion - `ClampTest.cs` - Value clamping between min/max - `HypotenuseTest.cs` - Pythagorean theorem calculation - `MaxOfThreeTest.cs` - Maximum of three values - `MaxOfTwoTest.cs` - Maximum of two values - `MinOfTwoTest.cs` - Minimum of two values - `ModuloTest.cs` - Modulo operation - `PowerTest.cs` - Power/exponentiation - `SignTest.cs` - Sign determination (-1, 0, +1) - `SquareTest.cs` - Square of a number
### Arithmetic/ (9 tests) Basic arithmetic operations: - `AbsoluteDifferenceTest.cs` - Absolute difference between two numbers - `AverageTest.cs` - Average calculation - `CeilingDivisionTest.cs` - Ceiling division (round up) - `CountDigitsTest.cs` - Count digits in a number - `DigitalRootTest.cs` - Digital root (iterative digit sum) - `DigitSumTest.cs` - Sum of digits - `ProductOfDigitsTest.cs` - Product of digits - `ReverseNumberTest.cs` - Reverse digits of a number - `SumOfSquaresTest.cs` - Sum of squares - `SumRangeTest.cs` - Sum of range of numbers
### NumberTheory/ (9 tests) Number theory and mathematical sequences: - `CountPrimeFactorsTest.cs` - Count prime factors of a number - `FactorialTest.cs` - Factorial calculation - `FibonacciTest.cs` - Fibonacci sequence - `GCDTest.cs` - Greatest Common Divisor - `IsPerfectNumberTest.cs` - Check if number is perfect - `IsPowerOfTwoTest.cs` - Check if number is power of two - `IsPrimeTest.cs` - Prime number check - `LCMTest.cs` - Least Common Multiple - `NthTriangularNumberTest.cs` - Calculate nth triangular number - `SumOfDivisorsTest.cs` - Sum of all divisors
### Array/ (7 tests) Array and collection operations: - `ArrayProductTest.cs` - Product of array elements - `ArraySumTest.cs` - Sum of array elements - `BinarySearchTest.cs` - Binary search algorithm - `ContainsElementTest.cs` - Check if array contains element - `FindMaxTest.cs` - Find maximum in array - `IsSortedTest.cs` - Check if array is sorted - `MinArrayTest.cs` - Find minimum in array
### String/ (6 tests) String manipulation and analysis: - `CharCountTest.cs` - Count specific character in string - `CountOccurrencesTest.cs` - Count substring occurrences - `ReverseStringTest.cs` - Reverse a string - `StringLengthTest.cs` - String length calculation - `ToUpperCaseTest.cs` - Convert string to uppercase
### Validation/ (7 tests) Boolean validation and check operations: - `IsDivisibleByTest.cs` - Check if number is divisible by another - `IsEvenTest.cs` - Check if number is even - `IsInRangeTest.cs` - Check if value is in range - `IsLeapYearTest.cs` - Check if year is leap year - `IsPalindromeNumberTest.cs` - Check if number is palindrome - `IsPositiveTest.cs` - Check if number is positive
### Patterns/ (1 test) Pattern matching and advanced language features: - `PatternTests.cs` - Pattern matching tests
## Statistics
- **Total Tests**: 50 - **All Passing**: ✅
## Running Tests
Run all tests: ```bash dotnet test ConstExpr.Tests/ConstExpr.Tests.csproj ```
Run tests from a specific category: ```bash dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Math" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Arithmetic" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~NumberTheory" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Array" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~String" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Validation" dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Patterns" ```
Run a specific test: ```bash dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~AbsoluteValueTest" ```

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
